first_pass.purpose: Generate, connect, reformulate, and attack candidate accounting carriers before implementation.

evidence_pass.purpose: Attach bounded Python and Lean replay observations, search local contradiction memory, and invoke the fail-closed promotion gate.
evidence_pass.promotion_scope: SUPPORTED is bounded to the recorded research models and local gate; it is not RFC approval or implementation conformance.

compounding.prior_seed: ZRM-H02 monotone debit and credit limbs
compounding.method: The prior claim and counterexample were manually seeded because this pinned kernel revision has no run-import API.
next_frontier: accepted-journal opening and exact ordered coverage implementation

limitations: Research Kernel SUPPORTED means only that its local fail-closed gate passed; protocol authority remains external.
The kernel has no run-import API at the pinned revision, so prior-run compounding was a manual revision-bound seed.
Morph outputs are search candidates and were not promoted as validated equivalences.
Artifact text records replay observations but is not a signed build attestation or independent proof check.
The SQLite database and JSONL event log are observational research state and are not committed as ZRM authority.
Sparse byte encoding and ordered provenance coverage remain outside the Lean proof package.
ESSO was specified but not executed, and no ESSO claim entered a promotion gate.
non_claims: The receipt does not approve RFC-0004 or change SPECIFICATION.md.
The receipt does not establish Rust, circuit, cryptographic, data-availability, privacy, commit, or production correctness.
A future change to assumptions, bounds, schema, domains, or profiles requires fresh evidence and promotion.
